title: Career Opportunity Financial Analyst at Cashfree

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Financial Analyst at Cashfree
jsonLd.description:
We at Cashfree are looking for an experienced Financial Analyst based out of Gwalior. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Cashfree:
Cashfree is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cashfree!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
